message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker with parser epic and diagram type tasks

Update beads issue database to reflect the comprehensive parser expansion
plan. The new epic (bd-106) covers all 24+ mermaid diagram types that
mermaid-js supports, with individual task beads for each diagram type
parser, error recovery, and graceful degradation. Dependency edges wire
the new tasks into the existing project graph.

- Add EPIC bd-106: Complete Parser for All Mermaid Diagram Types
- Add task beads for ER diagram, git graph, mindmap, timeline, sankey,
  C4, kanban, architecture, block diagram, radar/XY/treemap, and more
- Wire dependency edges from new tasks to the parser epic
- Update status and metadata on existing beads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
